target.name: AbCellera
target.founder: Carl Hansen, Véronique Lecault, Kevin Heyries, Daniel Da Costa, Kathleen Lisaingo, Oleh Petriv

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 3 same-sector + same-stage peers in Biotech & Health. Range: $529M - $2.6B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Biotech & Health P/S median is 6.1x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

private.rationale: Same sector (Biotech & Health), same stage (Public), post-money $2.6B

private.name: Alto Neuroscience
private.rationale: Same sector (Biotech & Health), same stage (Public), post-money $529M

data.narrative:
AbCellera, a public-stage biotech and health company, was valued against a peer universe of three same-sector, same-stage comparables: Freenome ($2.6B), Recursion Pharmaceuticals ($1.8B), and Alto Neuroscience ($529M). This narrow peer set reflects the scarcity of direct public comparables in the frontier biotech space.

The Peer-Median method was the sole applicable triangulation approach, yielding an implied valuation of $1.8B. This reflects the median across the three-company sample. The Public-Comp Anchoring method, which would employ a 6.1x sector price-to-sales multiple observed across three public biotech tickers (RXRX, TEM, ONT.L), could not be applied due to the absence of target revenue data on file. A broader private comparables universe of eight companies exists but was not prioritized in the primary valuation.

The analysis supports a valuation range of $1.5B to $2.1B (median: $1.8B), anchored on peer medians with modest adjustment bands. Key uncertainties center on the limited applicable methodology—reliance on a single peer-based approach—and the constrained peer sample size of three companies. Revenue disclosure, were it available, would enable multiples-based validation. The wide dispersion within the peer set itself ($529M to $2.6B) signals material heterogeneity in comparable company trajectories and risk profiles that peer-median approaches may not fully capture.
